response.justification: While an exceptionally talented polyglot engineer with strong software fundamentals and staff-level seniority, this candidate lacks the core mandatory requirements for the role. They have only 1-2 years of C++ experience across their entire career versus the required 5-10 years, no demonstrated Windows platform development despite explicit requirement, and critically, zero capital markets or fixed income domain expertise. Their recent professional focus (5+ years) has been web and cloud technologies rather than systems-level C++ development.
strengths: Exceptional software engineering fundamentals with demonstrated expertise in TDD, CI/CD, and architectural design across multiple domains
Staff-level engineer with proven mentoring and leadership abilities, including workshop design and technical education
Polyglot programmer with experience across diverse technology stacks, showing strong adaptability and learning capability
concerns: Critical gap in C++ depth: only 1-2 years scattered across career versus mandatory 5-10 years of strong hands-on experience
No capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain experience—one of the two mandatory domain requirements
No demonstrated Windows platform development experience despite being an explicit role requirement; recent work focused on web/cloud technologies on Linux

key_factors.factor: C++ and Windows systems programming expertise
Capital markets or investment banking domain knowledge
Software engineering fundamentals and seniority level
